testCases.description: The isHidden prop has been removed from AccordionContent. Visibility is now controlled automatically based on the isExpanded prop on AccordionItem.
AccordionItem markup updated to render a div wrapper element.
The isExpanded prop has been moved from AccordionToggle to AccordionItem.
testCases.notes: isExpanded moved from AccordionToggle to AccordionItem correctly

testCases.description: Codemods remove data-codemods attributes and comments after other fixes complete.
testCases.notes: Partial data-codemods cleanup; meta-test, not a real API change

testCases.description: The border prop has been removed from Avatar. Use the isBordered prop instead.
testCases.notes: Did not rename border to isBordered on Avatar

testCases.description: The variant property has been removed from Banner. Use the new color or status properties instead.
testCases.notes: Banner variant replaced with color/status correctly

testCases.description: Icons must be passed to the icon prop on Button instead of as children.
testCases.notes: Did not move icon from children to icon prop on Button

testCases.description: The isActive prop on Button has been renamed to isClicked.
testCases.notes: Did not rename isActive to isClicked on Button

testCases.description: Props for raised/clickable cards removed: isSelectableRaised, isDisabledRaised, hasSelectableInput, selectableInputAriaLabel, onSelectableInputChange.
testCases.notes: Migrated to new clickable card pattern with CardHeader selectableActions

testCases.description: Markup for clickable cards updated. selectableActions properties on CardHeader are no longer necessary for basic clickable cards.
testCases.notes: Did not handle selectableActions removal for basic clickable cards

testCases.description: The isLabelBeforeButton prop has been replaced with labelPosition='start'.
testCases.notes: Did not replace isLabelBeforeButton with labelPosition='start'

testCases.description: Chip component has been deprecated. Imports should be moved to the deprecated package.
testCases.notes: Chip moved to deprecated package correctly

testCases.description: Chip and ChipGroup should be replaced with Label and LabelGroup components.
Banner and Label color prop updated: 'cyan' replaced with 'teal', 'gold' replaced with 'yellow'.
testCases.notes: cyan→teal, gold→yellow color prop updates correct

testCases.description: ContentHeader component has been renamed to PageHeader.
testCases.notes: ContentHeader renamed to PageHeader with import update

testCases.description: The isPlainButtonAction prop has been removed from DataListAction. The wrapper is no longer needed.
Multiple deprecated components fully removed: Application Launcher, Context Selector, old Dropdown, Options Menu, old Page Header, old Select.
DragDrop has been deprecated. Imports should be moved to the deprecated package.
testCases.notes: DragDrop moved to deprecated package correctly

testCases.description: The hasNoPadding prop has been removed from DrawerHead.
DrawerContent, DrawerPanelContent, and DrawerSection colorVariant value 'light-200' has been replaced with 'secondary'.
DrawerContent 'no-background' colorVariant value removed. New 'primary' value added. New DrawerContentColorVariant enum introduced.
testCases.notes: Partial colorVariant no-background handling; did not map to primary

testCases.description: DrawerPanelBody is no longer rendered internally within DrawerHead.
Previous DualListSelector implementation has been deprecated and moved to the deprecated package.
testCases.notes: Incomplete deprecated package migration for DualListSelector

testCases.description: The Next implementation of DualListSelector has been promoted as the recommended version. Import paths updated from /next to main package.
testCases.notes: Did not update DualListSelector /next import paths

testCases.description: Duplicate import specifiers should be removed via cleanup codemod.
EmptyStateHeader and EmptyStateIcon are no longer exported from @patternfly/react-core.
testCases.notes: EmptyState exports migrated to headerText/icon props

testCases.description: EmptyStateHeader and EmptyStateIcon are now rendered internally within EmptyState. Pass headingLevel, titleText, and icon props to EmptyState directly.
testCases.notes: Partial EmptyStateHeader consolidation; not fully idiomatic

testCases.description: ErrorState props renamed: errorTitle to titleText, errorDescription to bodyText.

testCases.component: Form field group header title text object
testCases.description: Interface typo fixed: FormFiledGroupHeaderTitleTextObject renamed to FormFieldGroupHeaderTitleTextObject.
The labelIcon prop on FormGroup has been renamed to labelHelp.
The hasIcon and isDynamic props have been removed from HelperTextItem. The icon renders automatically based on the variant prop.
testCases.notes: hasIcon and isDynamic props removed correctly

testCases.description: The screenReaderText prop on HelperTextItem now renders only when variant is not 'default'.
InvalidObject props renamed: invalidObjectTitleText to titleText, invalidObjectBodyText to bodyText.
The href prop is now required on JumpLinksItem.
JumpLinksItem markup changed. It now uses a Button component internally. The onClick type has been updated.
KebabToggle has been removed. Replace with MenuToggle with variant='plain' and EllipsisVIcon.
The isOverflowLabel prop on Label has been replaced with variant='overflow'.
testCases.notes: Did not replace isOverflowLabel with variant='overflow'

testCases.description: LogSnippet prop renamed: leftBorderVariant to variant. The enum has been replaced with AlertVariant.
LogViewer stylesheet has been moved out of the PatternFly package into the LogViewer package itself.
testCases.notes: LogViewer CSS import path updated correctly

testCases.description: LoginMainFooterLinksItem structure changed. Properties are now passed via children using a Button component.
testCases.notes: Incomplete LoginMainFooterLinksItem restructuring to Button children

testCases.description: LoginMainHeader markup updated to use a div wrapper instead of a header element.
The old MastheadBrand component has been renamed to MastheadLogo. A new MastheadBrand component wraps MastheadLogo.
testCases.notes: MastheadBrand→MastheadLogo rename and MastheadBrand wrapper correct

testCases.description: The backgroundColor prop has been removed from Masthead.
testCases.notes: backgroundColor prop removed from Masthead correctly

testCases.description: Masthead structure updated. MastheadToggle and MastheadBrand should be wrapped in MastheadMain.
testCases.notes: Partial MastheadMain wrapping; rename done but structure incomplete

testCases.description: MenuItemAction markup updated. It now uses a Button internally with a wrapper and removes the icon wrapper.
Icons should be passed to the icon prop on MenuToggle instead of as children for proper styling.
testCases.notes: Did not move icon from children to icon prop on MenuToggle

testCases.description: InvalidObject component has been renamed to MissingPage.
The previous Modal implementation has been deprecated and moved to the deprecated package.
testCases.notes: Modal migrated to modern ModalHeader/ModalBody/ModalFooter API

testCases.description: The Next implementation of Modal has been promoted as the recommended version. Import paths updated from /next to main package.
testCases.notes: Modal /next import partially updated; mostly correct

testCases.description: The leftBorderVariant and withHeaderBorder props have been removed from MultiContentCard.
testCases.notes: leftBorderVariant and withHeaderBorder removed from MultiContentCard

testCases.description: The 'tertiary' variant on Nav is no longer supported. Use variant='horizontal-subnav' instead.
The theme prop on Nav is no longer supported. Use light/dark mode theming instead.
The hasNavLinkWrapper prop has been removed from NavItem. Icons should be passed to the icon prop.
testCases.notes: hasNavLinkWrapper removed but icon not moved to icon prop

testCases.description: NotAuthorized props renamed: description to bodyText, title to titleText.
NotificationBadge markup changed. It now uses a stateful button internally.
NotificationDrawerHeader no longer uses the Text component internally. It now renders a native h1 element.
The header prop on Page has been renamed to masthead.
The isTertiaryNavGrouped prop on Page has been renamed to isHorizontalSubnavGrouped.
The isTertiaryNavWidthLimited prop on Page has been renamed to isHorizontalSubnavWidthLimited.
The tertiaryNav prop on Page has been renamed to horizontalSubnav.
Page markup changed. PageBody now wraps contents when horizontalSubnav or breadcrumb is passed.
The isWidthLimited prop behavior has changed on PageBreadcrumb and PageSection. A new hasBodyWrapper prop has been introduced.
testCases.notes: Did not add hasBodyWrapper={false} to PageSection

testCases.description: The isSelected prop has been removed from PageHeaderToolsItem.
PageNavigation component has been removed from PatternFly.
testCases.notes: PageNavigation replaced with Nav placement correctly

testCases.description: The 'nav' type for PageSection has been removed.
The variant prop on PageSection now accepts only 'default' or 'secondary'.
Classes from the variant prop on PageSection only apply when type is 'default'.
testCases.notes: Partial handling of variant type behavioral change

testCases.description: The theme prop has been removed from PageSidebar.
testCases.notes: theme prop removed from PageSidebar correctly

testCases.description: Pagination markup changed. A wrapper element has been added around PaginationOptionsMenu toggle.
The default appendTo value has been updated to document.body for Dropdown, Select, and Popper.
aria-describedby has been removed from TextInput within SimpleFileUpload. Use the browseButtonAriaDescribedby prop instead.
CSS variable --pf-v6-c-slider__step--Left updated to --pf-v6-c-slider__step--InsetInlineStart.
testCases.notes: Partial CSS variable update for slider step

testCases.description: The labelOff prop has been removed from Switch.
The isSecondary prop on Tabs has been renamed to isSubtab.
The 'light300' value for variant on Tabs has been replaced with 'secondary'.
Tabs scroll button markup updated. Scroll buttons now use Button components with a wrapper div.
Text, TextContent, TextList, and TextListItem have been replaced with a single Content component.
testCases.notes: Partial Text→Content replacement; some instances missed

testCases.description: CSS variables for sticky columns on Th updated to RTL-compatible names: Left to InsetInlineStart, Right to InsetInlineEnd.
testCases.notes: Partial Th CSS variable update to RTL-compatible names

testCases.description: Tile component has been deprecated and moved to the deprecated package. Use Card instead.
testCases.notes: Tile partially migrated to deprecated; incomplete Card replacement

testCases.description: React tokens with PatternFly token variable values are now prefixed with t_.
testCases.notes: Partial t_ prefix update for tokens

testCases.description: CSS tokens updated. Global non-color tokens are auto-fixed. Color tokens need manual replacement.
Multiple props removed from Toolbar: usePageInsets, alignSelf, widths, alignment on ToolbarItem.
testCases.notes: Did not remove usePageInsets, alignSelf, widths, alignment props

testCases.description: Chip-based props renamed to Label-based across toolbar components: chipGroupContentRef to labelGroupContentRef, chipGroupComponent to labelGroupComponent, etc.
testCases.notes: Chip-to-label prop renames across toolbar components correct

testCases.description: Toolbar interfaces renamed: ToolbarChipGroup to ToolbarLabelGroup, ToolbarChip to ToolbarLabel.
The spacer property has been removed from ToolbarGroup, ToolbarItem, and ToolbarToggleGroup.
